input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.2
            TITLE: the brake system must:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.2: The Brake System must:
T.3.1.2 The Brake System must:  
a. Act on all four wheels  
b. Be operated by a single control 
c. Be capable of locking all four wheels

final_answer: T.3.1.2 The Brake System must: a. Act on all four wheels b. Be operated by a single control c. Be capable of locking all four wheels
